channel.title: Quantitative Trading on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Quantitative Trading on Judy AI Lab

item.title: The Holding Time Effect: Why Your Trades Should Close Fast
item.description: Analysis of 30+ live trades reveals a strong holding time effect: trades closed within 2 hours have 65% win rate, while those exceeding 2 hours drop to 20%.

item.title: Your Strategy Isn't Broken — The Market Changed
item.description: A profitable strategy suddenly stops working? It might not be the strategy — the market regime changed. Here’s how we detect market states using ADX, BB Width, and ATR, and automatically switch strategies.

item.title: Position Sizing: The Most Underrated Part of Quantitative Trading
item.description: Most traders spend 90% of their time finding signals and 10% thinking about position size. But math shows: the same strategy with different position sizing can produce results that differ by 10x.

item.title: 100% Win Rate in Backtesting? Don't Celebrate Yet — Our Most Painful Lesson
item.description: We developed a mean reversion strategy. Backtesting showed 3 out of 8 combinations hitting 100% win rate. Then we ran Out-of-Sample validation, and 100% crashed to 25%. Here’s what happened.

item.title: Quantitative Trading System Build: From First Backtest Code to Paper Trading
item.description: We spent two weeks building a complete quantitative trading system from scratch — four strategies, eight Walk-Forward validations, Z-score statistical tests, Paper Trading. This article documents the entire process, including the biggest pitfalls we encountered.
